description.p: You can increase one of the scores by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You can increase three different scores by 1.
You can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can’t increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.
Select a feat of your choice.
You can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can’t increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.
Select a feat of your choice.
You can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can’t increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.
Select a feat of your choice.
You can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can’t increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.
Select a feat of your choice.
You can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can’t increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.
Select a feat of your choice.
You can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can’t increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.
Select a feat of your choice.
You can increase Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution score by 1.
You can increase Strength, Dexterity, or Intelligence score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Strength, Dexterity, or Intelligence score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Strength, Dexterity, and Intelligence score by 1.
You can increase Strength, Dexterity, or Wisdom score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Strength, Dexterity, or Wisdom score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Strength, Dexterity, and Wisdom score by 1.
You can increase Strength, Dexterity, or Charisma score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Strength, Dexterity, or Charisma score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Strength, Dexterity, and Charisma score by 1.
You can increase Strength, Constitution, or Intelligence score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Strength, Constitution, or Intelligence score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Strength, Constitution, and Intelligence score by 1.
You can increase Strength, Constitution, or Wisdom score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.

You can increase Strength, Constitution, or Charisma score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Strength, Constitution, or Charisma score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Strength, Constitution, and Charisma score by 1.
You can increase Strength, Intelligence, or Wisdom score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Strength, Intelligence, or Wisdom score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Strength, Intelligence, and Wisdom score by 1.
You can increase Strength, Intelligence, or Charisma score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Strength, Intelligence, or Charisma score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Strength, Intelligence, and Charisma score by 1.
You can increase Strength, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.

You can increase Dexterity, Constitution, or Intelligence score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Dexterity, Constitution, or Intelligence score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Dexterity, Constitution, and Intelligence score by 1.
You can increase Dexterity, Constitution, or Wisdom score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Dexterity, Constitution, or Wisdom score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Dexterity, Constitution, and Wisdom score by 1.
You can increase Dexterity, Constitution, or Charisma score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Dexterity, Constitution, or Charisma score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Dexterity, Constitution, and Charisma score by 1.
You can increase Dexterity, Intelligence, or Wisdom score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Dexterity, Intelligence, or Wisdom score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Dexterity, Intelligence, and Wisdom score by 1.
You can increase Dexterity, Intelligence, or Charisma score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.

You can increase Constitution, Intelligence, or Wisdom score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Constitution, Intelligence, or Wisdom score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Constitution, Intelligence, and Wisdom score by 1.
You can increase Constitution, Intelligence, or Charisma score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Constitution, Intelligence, or Charisma score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Constitution, Intelligence, and Charisma score by 1.
You can increase Constitution, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Constitution, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Constitution, Wisdom, and Charisma score by 1.
You can increase Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma score by 1.
Your Strength increases by 1.
Your Dexterity increases by 1.
Your Constitution increases by 1.
Your Intelligence increases by 1.
Your Wisdom increases by 1.
Your Charisma increases by 1.
Your Strength increases by 2.
Your Dexterity increases by 2.
Your Constitution increases by 2.
Your Intelligence increases by 2.
Your Wisdom increases by 2.
Your Charisma increases by 2.
Your Strength decreases by 1.
Your Dexterity decreases by 1.
Your Constitution decreases by 1.
Your Intelligence decreases by 1.
Your Wisdom decreases by 1.
Your Charisma decreases by 1.
